query: SELECT id, name, username, branchId, role FROM users WHERE (name LIKE '%عبد الرحمن%' OR name LIKE '%صفاء%' OR name LIKE '%غازي%' OR name LIKE '%عمار%' OR name LIKE '%احمد%') AND role = 'delivery' AND branchId = 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT id, name, username, branchId, role FROM users WHERE (name LIKE '%عبد الرحمن%' OR name LIKE '%صفاء%' OR name LIKE '%غازي%' OR name LIKE '%عمار%' OR name LIKE '%احمد%') AND role = 'delivery' AND branchId = 2;
